  "findings": [
    "Refrigerant charge adjusted using subjective 'beer-can cold' method instead of manufacturer-specified subcooling or superheat targets."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Recover or add refrigerant as necessary to meet the exact subcooling and superheat targets specified in the manufacturer charging charts."
  ],
  "rationale": "Charging by feel ('beer-can cold') is an inaccurate and non-compliant practice that leads to undercharging or overcharging, reducing system efficiency, risking compressor damage, and violating manufacturer installation and service specifications.",
  "references": [
    "Manufacturer charging charts",
    "ACCA Standard 5 (HVAC Quality Installation Specification)"
  ]
}
